title: ArgusRed releases an AI security-scan and pen-test CLI
friendlyTitle: ArgusRed uses AI to help find security problems in code
summary: ArgusRed’s CLI offers read-only security scans and gated active pen-testing modes for authorized systems. The tool lets users choose security modules, configure agent permissions, and generate markdown reports with severity, cause, evidence, and fix direction.
friendlySummary: ArgusRed is a command-line tool that can scan code for security issues and write a report. It has read-only mode and stricter settings for active testing.
whyItMatters: Security is becoming one of the clearest practical uses for agentic code analysis, but permission boundaries matter. ArgusRed’s split between read-only scanning and explicitly gated exploit verification is the right design pattern to watch.
friendlyWhyItMatters: AI can help teams spot risks earlier. The useful part is not just finding bugs, but doing it with clear limits so the tool does not act unsafely.
